I used the same gen settings that I made for my Jake bot, but with a different prompt. I know you all hated Jake’s man spreading but I love it haha 😆 He looks like such a slut and if there’s one thing I love, it’s sluts 😘 Please no complaining in the comments about how I chose to gen my men. I often see art styles I don’t particularly care for here on Janitor for but I’m not in the comments telling the creator how ugly I think their character is.

But if you’re reading this, welcome back to my profile! I love seeing you guys here. Be polite and happy gooning! I love how horny you guys are lol 🫣❤️

I also saw that public chats are back, and I remember this feature from way back when I just joined Janitor. I’m probably not going to publish my chats, but I would love it if you guys did! I have always been curious about what you guys do with my boys. No pressure of course, this feature isn’t for everyone.
